name: cognitive-revolution-rpg
description: The Cognitive Revolution — Complete Phaser 3 isometric RPG

sessions.summary: Fixed and deployed The Cognitive Revolution Phaser 3 RPG. Key fixes: (1) Removed invalid createRadialGradientTexture() API call in TitleScene, replaced with proper canvas gradient texture approach. (2) Added animated loading bar with progress messages. (3) Added building label text system to TownScene (Phaser Text objects positioned each frame). (4) Added town name labels to OverworldScene. (5) Verified all 11 Phaser 3 scenes have correct API usage. Game deployed successfully with full visual QA passing.
